title: Header, Trailer, and Break Frame Level Processing
breadcrumbs: Header, Trailer, and Break Frame Level Processing
text: Header, Trailer, and Break Frame Level Processing Form and report components can contain header, footer, and break frames that are used to show temporary variable information, such as the current date, page number, running totals and so on. By programming the getFocus trigger of these frames, you can influence the printing behavior and the contents of these frames. Such frames get focus as the print line that they appear on is entered in the print file. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
